name: RABBIT-FEATURE-BACKLOG-3
title: Add rabbit-feature-audit skill for batch-or-single feature validation/sweep
description:
Move feature audit ownership from rabbit-cage (validate-all.py) to rabbit-feature.

Create new skill rabbit-feature-audit at .claude/features/rabbit-feature/skills/rabbit-feature-audit/SKILL.md. Signature:
  Skill('rabbit-feature-audit', args: 'all')          # sweep every feature
  Skill('rabbit-feature-audit', args: '<feature-name>') # audit single feature

Uses contract.lib.checks.validate_feature for the actual validation. Returns structured findings (pass/fail per feature + reasons).

Update rabbit-feature feature.json surface.skills + contract.md provides.skills. Add e2e test.

DEPENDS ON: contract library extraction backlog (uses checks.validate_feature). NOTE: this cycle ADDS the skill. A LATER cycle removes validate-all.py from rabbit-cage.
